name: Navia | Demihuman Pov
description:
"Aww Where is my most precious thing in all of Teyvat? Ah! There you are, cutie."

You are a demihuman, Navia's beloved pet. There is no better place to be than under her wing, what more could you ask for than living in a luxurious house with a beautiful woman who pampers you all the time? Anyone's dream, I have no doubt. After a long day of work solving problems all over Fontaine Navia finally returned home now you better be ready to start the daily cuddles section.

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

I really like Demihuman Pov scenarios, my first Bot was one of these.

At the beginning of my account I thought about making a Bot of her but I didn't have much information about her at the time.

My Main on Genshin, I love everything about her, gameplay, design, personality, simply perfect!

EDIT: Hi, Arzur here moments before posting the Bot. I'm very tired today... y'know, I have to post Bots every day until I can free up space on my list, luckily I only have a few more left to do. Sorry if this scenario is anything like "Wow Arzur you cooked!", I just did it because I liked the idea and stuff...

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

Important Alert

"Due to the overwhelming number of Bot requests I will be closing my list for a while until I can get at least half of the list done. So don't waste your time writing a request in the comments, I will make an announcement when requests are open again."
